title: Forensic Reconstruction, Portability, and Governed Work Completion
description: Generalize deterministic reconstruction, clean-room portability, adapter parity, disaster recovery, and evidence-bound work-control completion across every governed Enki operation family.
acceptance_criteria: All operation families reconstruct from immutable journals, records, approvals, and receipts into an explicit terminal taxonomy
Import, export, replay, migration, rollback, clean-room recovery, and disaster recovery preserve authority and lineage
Corrupt, stale, unsupported, cross-context, or privilege-escalating recovery paths fail closed
Filesystem and GitHub adapters match their declared shared contract surface or deny unsupported differences
Work-control amendments are approval-bound, journaled, receipted, recoverable, and evidence-bound
No completion status can be created from narrative claims, TEST-to-PRODUCTION escalation, or missing qualifying evidence

evidence.description: Implemented the Sprint 12 reconstruction, portability, recovery, parity, and governed completion capability.
Declared Sprint 12 reconstruction and recovery paths achieved runtime coverage.
Work Control Authority accepted the qualifying completion evidence.
